description: You are an administrative supervisor. Consolidate three department quarterly reports (Sales, Operations, and Finance) from /home/ga/Documents/ (sales_q3.odt, operations_q3.odt, and finance_q3.odt) into a single, unified quarterly business review document saved as /home/ga/Documents/quarterly_review_q3.odt. The document must feature the title "Q3 2025 Quarterly Business Review" (bold, centered, at least 14pt), a 3-5 sentence Executive Summary summarizing highlights from all departments, and a Table of Contents. Merge the content in the order of Sales, then Operations, then Finance, preserving all data tables. Use Heading 1 for department names and Heading 2 for subsections, and format the body text using a consistent serif font (11pt or 12pt) with justified alignment.
